source_pr.title: *: Fix select lock option for union statement
source_pr.body:
In "A union B for update", "for update" belongs to union statement, so both A
and B should use it.

Update this one https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/6335

@coocood @zz-jason @shenli

symptoms: // 'For update' would be ignored if 'order by' or 'limit' exists. (executor/executor_test.go)
failure_signature: // 'For update' would be ignored if 'order by' or 'limit' exists. (executor/executor_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: Patch fixes UNION ... FOR UPDATE lock-scope semantics and adds tests; it is not a targeted flaky-test stabilization change.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).

evidence: evidence: // 'For update' would be ignored if 'order by' or 'limit' exists. (executor/executor_test.go)
